faq.title: FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about the Universal Principle Generator

items.question: What is the Universal Principle Generator?
items.answer: UPG uses AI to generate interactive 3D visualizations for any science topic. Each visualization includes Three.js 3D scenes, mathematical formulas, adjustable parameters, knowledge cards, and quizzes.

items.question: How many credits does it cost?
items.answer: Each generation costs 10 credits. Regenerating an unsatisfactory result costs 5 credits. Failed generations are not charged.

items.question: What topics are supported?
items.answer: UPG supports a wide range of science topics including physics, chemistry, biology, mathematics, astronomy, and engineering. Enter any topic and AI will create a visualization for it.

items.question: Can I download the visualization?
items.answer: Yes! Every generated visualization can be downloaded as a standalone HTML file that runs offline in any modern browser.

items.question: What if the generation quality is poor?
items.answer: You can regenerate at a reduced cost of 5 credits. You can also report issues to help us improve the system.
